sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Thermal operations topology variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds procedural floor layouts, redundant cooling loops, maintenance windows, or cooperative facilities roles without introducing network telemetry.

queue.title: Interpretation content and cooperative variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds procedural phrase construction, language-pair specific terminology, cooperative speaker and interpreter roles, or richer nonvisual pacing without adding network speech services.

queue.title: Cooperative circuit technician mode
queue.reason: Consider only if a future pass can add asymmetric roles, shared diagnostics, and turn handoffs without weakening solo keyboard and touch play.

recentDecisions.title: Thermal Ops Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local data-center operations simulator with spatial heat propagation, rack workload migration, cooling power tradeoffs, emergency coolant, power caps, outages and recovery, scoring, adaptive modes, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Interpreter Booth 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local simultaneous-interpretation strategy game with three scenarios, incoming phrase queues, fidelity and speed tradeoffs, terminology checks, cognitive load, lag, audience trust, repair actions, scoring, adaptive modes, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Circuit Relay Lab 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Upgraded Circuit Relay Lab with guaranteed-solvable procedural boards, voltage and resistance tradeoffs, fuse overloads, diagnostic scans, richer failure recovery, nonvisual circuit narration, adaptive difficulty, scoring, touch and keyboard controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Circuit Relay Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local spatial circuit-routing puzzle with three missions, rotatable tiles, live connectivity, overload risk, limited moves, repair charges, scoring, adaptive modes, session unlocks, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Museum Flow Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local spatial museum-management game with three briefs, exhibit placement and removal, visitor-flow simulation, budget and energy tradeoffs, accessibility routing, crowd incidents, scoring, adaptive modes, session unlocks, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Evidence Chamber 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local deduction strategy game with three cases, branching investigation, limited actions, evidence inspection, support and contradiction links, testimony challenges, credibility, confidence, adaptive modes, session unlocks, scoring, meaningful weak-case outcomes, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Orbital Salvage Yard 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local spatial salvage game with real-time flight, drifting debris, contract manifests, fuel, heat, cargo mass, hull damage, repair, scoring, adaptive modes, session unlocks, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, optional local audio, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.
